metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/nisr/2025/191","TITLE":"The Farm Sustainability Standards (Amendment) Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/nisr/2025/191","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.xht","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/made/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/nisr/2025/191/contents/made","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-05T03:07:48Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-05T03:02:47.672705Z","DocumentMainType":"NorthernIrelandStatutoryRule","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"191","ISBN":"'9780338025579'","CreationDate":"2025-11-28","SUBJECT":"AGRICULTURE","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"AGRICULTURE","SUMMARY":"These Regulations are made in exercise of the powers conferred by sections 48 and 50(3)(a) of, and paragraph 5 of Schedule 6 to, the Agriculture Act2020 (c.21)in order to make miscellaneous amendments and corrections to The Farm Sustainability Standards Regulations (Northern Ireland) 2025 (SR2025 No.165).","":""}
